checked_queries: Autonomous Agent fees fixed plus payload
spawn fee plus payload delivery result length
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No autonomous-agent fixed Phase 1 fee helper or Phase 2 AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI plus payload-length fee calculation exists in the audited repo set.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs has sovereign-agent escrow based on max iterations/tool calls and Phase 2 work metrics, not autonomous spawn fee plus payload length.
crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs and crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs calculate sovereign-agent Phase 2 fees from iterations/tool_calls.
crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs has an AutonomousAgent capability tag reserved but maps sovereign and persistent precompiles to HttpCall capability.

notes: The present sovereign-agent fee model is related but uses work metrics, not the invariant's spawn-fee-plus-payload formula.
rationale: The commit introduces autonomous agent fee constants, Phase 1 fee/escrow helpers, Phase 2 fee calculation, and uses that Phase 2 calculation in both the payload builder and verifier. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Autonomous Agent Phase 1 fees use a fixed executor fee plus standard commitment and inclusion fees, and Phase 2 fees use AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI plus payload fee based on delivery result length with zero validator fees.
suggested_falsification_tests: For an autonomous agent request of known input length and a settlement delivery result of known byte length, assert wallet validation uses calculate_autonomous_agent_fees for Phase 1 and builder/verifier both use calculate_autonomous_agent_fees_phase2 with identical totals. Mutate delivery result length and assert the payload component changes consistently.
summary: Autonomous Agent fixed-plus-payload fee helpers are not ported.
test_or_falsification_candidate: For an autonomous agent request of known input length and a settlement delivery result of known byte length, assert wallet validation uses calculate_autonomous_agent_fees for Phase 1 and builder/verifier both use calculate_autonomous_agent_fees_phase2 with identical totals. Mutate delivery result length and assert the payload component changes consistently.
title: Autonomous Agent fees are fixed plus payload
